query:
SELECT 
  ii.id, 
  ii.stockNumber, 
  ii.brand, 
  ii.model,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facebookAds WHERE inventoryItemId = ii.id) as adCount
FROM inventoryItems ii
WHERE ii.dealerId = 60001
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facebookAds WHERE inventoryItemId = ii.id) > 0;
